author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMBHIKISHO wamanzi uholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe ZIFUNGE zagomela ukuthi zizoqhubeka nokuwuvala ngamathayi avuthayo umgwaqo uR66, eShowe, izakhamuzi ezingenawo amanzi eZiqwaqweni, eMlalazi. Lezi zakhamuzi esezinengekile zitshele Isolezwe ukuthi sekuphele izinyanga ezimbili zingenawo amanzi. Omunye wazo, uMnuz Ntethelelo Mpungose, uthe okubacasula kakhulu wukuthi izakhamuzi zaku-ward 9, okuyi-ward engumakhelwane wabo, zona zinawo amanzi. “Sizizwa sideleleka siyizakhamuzi zaku-ward 10. Asiqondi ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani ukuthi ku-ward 9 abekhona amanzi, kuthi kweyethu, kungaphumi ngisho iconsi kompompi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe bezwe ngandlebenye ukuthi kukhona abasebenzi bakaMasipala wesiFunda, iKing Cetshwayo, abathengwa yiqembu elithile lepolitiki ukuthi bavale amanzi ku-ward 9. “Asazi ukuthi lezi zinsolo ziyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa zisicabangisa okuningi ngoba ngempela asinikwa thina amanzi,” usho kanje. INDLALA yamanzi iholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe Uthe sebeze baqashe izimoto ezibabiza u-R200 ukuyobakhelela amanzi ku-ward 9. Uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi iningi alisebenzi, alinayo le mali. “Kudingeka ukuthi ukhiphe okungenani o-R200 ababili ngesonto ukuze uthole amanzi anele. Asinayo le mali. Eminye imizi iphethwe yizaguga. Ziphoqeleka ukuthi zihlephule empeshenini yazo ukuze zithole amanzi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe ezinye izaguga zisuke zingenayo le mali, zize zingene ezibophezelweni nabezimoto eziqashwayo ukuthi abahambe bayozikhelela amanzi, zizokhokha uma sezihole impesheni. Uveze ukuthi okunye okubaphatha kabi wukuthi akhona amaloli athunyelwayo ukuthi abahlinzeke ngamanzi kodwa abashayeli bawo, bawadayisela imindeni enemali. “Amaloli afika ebusuku azokwethela abanamathangi, abawakhokhela u-R500 amanzi. Abangenamali, basala kanjalo,” kusho uMpungose, othe nalokhu bafuna kungenelelwe kukho. Esinye isakhamuzi, uMnuz Sibusiso Mkhize, sithe, bazoqhubeka nokubhikisha kuze kuphume amanzi kompompi babo. “Sikhathele wukuxhashazwa. Balokhu bebika imbiba nebuzi, thina esikufunayo amanzi,” kusho uMkhize. Okhulumela uMasipala wesiFunda iKing Cetshwayo, uNkk Rekha Naidoo, uthe akusekude ukuthi inkinga yamanzi ebhekene nomphakathi waku-wadi 10 eMlalazi ixazululwe ngokugcwele. Uthe iziphathimandla zikamasipala waseKing Cetshwayo kanjalo nowaseMlalazi, zibe nomhlangano nezakhamizi ezithintekayo. "Ukuphazamiseka kwamanzi bekudalwa ukuthikamezeka kwesiphehli samanzi Kwahlokohloko. Lokhu kulungisiwe ngoLwesihlanu," kusho uNkk Naidoo. Uthe okunye ukwenzekayo ukuthi amanzi avulelwa imiphakathi ngezikhathi ezehlukene, okwenza bangakwazi ukuwathola ngesikhathi esisodwa amanzi. "Kulezo zindawo amanzi asuke engaphumi kuzona, siwahlinzeka ngamaloli," usho kanje. Uthembise ukuthi lesi simo esibonakala eZiqwaqweni, sizoshintsha esikhathini esingamasonto ambalwa kusuka manje njengoba kukhona izinhlelo zokuqeda inkinga yamanzi kuwadi 9 no-10. Uthe projekthi yokuqala edle uR65 million esisetshenzwe cishe u-78%, ezolungela ukunikezelwa emphakathini ezinyangeni ezimbili ezizayo, izohlinzeka ngamanzi imindeni engu-1 350 yaseNkume, Gawozi naseZiqwaqweni. Uveze ukuthi eyesibili edle uR72 million, izohlinzeka isibalo esifanayo semindeni yakuwadi 9, yona uthe isiku-92% umsebenzi osuqediwe kuyona.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Umama Joy ukhala ngoxhaso lokuyobukela indebe yomhlaba phesheya UMama Joy uthandazela ukuxoshwa kukaMcKenzie onqaba ukumkhokhela ukubuka iNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa UNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke, uGayton McKenzie, uthi uMama Joy akacele umyeni wakhe amkhokhele izindleko zokuyobuka imidlalo yeNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni 11 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America. UMcKenzie ukusho lokhu ephendula uMama Joy ku-X ethi njengabalandeli kumele bamukele ukuthi ngeke bayibuke iNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba ungqongqoshe nomnyango ngeke ubasize. “Asithandazele ukuthi umongameli asinikeze uNgqongqoshe omusha wezemiDlalo ozothanda abalandeli,” kubhala uMama Joy owaziwa ngokuzifela ngebhola. UMcKenzie uphendule ngokuthi uMama Joy unomyeni. “Akube wuye okhokhela isithandwa sakhe, i-Euro linamandla. Amadoda angamaFrench aziwa ngokutotosa izithandwa zawo, myekele akhokhe Sista Joy,” kusho uMcKenzie. UMama Joy unomyeni waseFrance amteketisa nnngelikaPapa Joy. Ekuqaleni uMama Joy ubebhalele umongameli weFifa uGianni Infantino ethi engathanda ukuyobuka iBafana Bafana ucela noma wubani ozomsiza ngoba uMcKenzie akafuni ukubakhokhela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: I-logo entsha yokukhuthaza abantu bakuleli, ikakhulu intsha ukuthi ivote UNGENA kwelinye igiya umkhankaso wokukhuthaza intsha ukuthi ivote okhethweni oluzayo lohulumeni basekhaya. Ikhomishini yezokhetho isiqhamuke nezinye izindlela zokukhuthaza intsha ukuthi ivote ngokuvula i-podcast kanjalo nohlelo oluzodlala kwithelevishini, oluzokhuluma ngokhetho. Lokhu kuvele izolo ngesikhathi ikhomishini yethula i-logo ezosetshenziswa njengoba ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube phakathi kukaNovemba nonyaka, noJanuwari ngonyaka ozayo. USihlalo wekhomishini uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uthe bazokwethula i-podcast ngesonto elizayo lapho kuzobe kukhulunywa khona ngokhetho. "Le podcast izoqala ukusebenza ngo-Ephreli 8, kanti izobe ifundisa ngokuvota. Kuzoba nohlelo oluzodlala kwi-SABC 1, kusuka ngoMeyi 1, 2026, lokukhuthaza abantu abasha ukuthi babe yingxenye yokhetho," usho kanje ekhuluma eGoli. Uthe ngalezi zinhlelo, bahlose ukuqeda ngamampunge nangezinto ezingelona iqiniso ezithinta ukhetho. Isikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini, uMnuz Sy Mamabolo, siveze ukuthi bahlela ukuqasha abasebenzi abevile ku-70 000, abazobe besebenza ngesikhathi kubhaliselwa ukuvota. "Bazobe bematasa ngesikhathi sempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota ngoJuni 20 no-21. Sesenze wonke amalungiselelo athinta impelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota." UMoepya uthe i-logo ethuliwe ihlose ukugqugquzela intsha ukuthi ivote. "Inhloso yayo njengoba ithi, "Sukuma, ziveze bese uvota". Isho ukuthi intsha kanjalo nabantu bakuleli kumele babhukule, bavote. Abangabhalisile ukuvota basenalo ithuba lokwenza lokhu," usho kanje. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi ukhetho luzoba ngolukhululekile, nolunokuthula. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kusalindwe uNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ukuthi amemezele usuku lokhetho. Amandla akuyena ngosuku lokhetho ngenxa yokuthi olohulumeni basekhaya. Usuku lokhetho lukazwelonke lumenyezelwa ngumengameli wezwe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kuzowashubela amakhansela ngemuva kokhetho AMANDLA azowela koSomlomo bomasipala abazoqhubeka baqaphe ukusebenza kwemikhandlu, uma kusalindwe ukumenyezelwa ngokusemthethweni kwemiphumela yokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuthi omasipala baqhubeke nokusebenza kusalindwe le miphumela. Ngokomthetho, imiphumela yokhetho kumele imenyezelwe ngemuva kwezinsuku eziyisikhokmbisa, kudlule ukhetho. UMnuz Lance Joel wenhlangano i-South African Local Government Association (Salga), utshele oSomlomo bomasipala baKwaZulu-Natal, emhlanganweni obusesiShayamthetho sesifundazwe eMgungundlovu, ngoLwesihlanu, ukuthi oSomlomo bazoqhubeka nokusebenza kuze kumenyezelwe imiphumela yokhetho. "Ningawubiza ngisho umhlangano wokhetho nangosuku lokhetho. Uma kwenzeka kuhlonzwa isimo senhlekelele ezweni, omasipala kumele baqhubeke nokuhambisa izidingo emphakathini, ngeke ume umsebenzi ngenxa yokuthi kunokhetho," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi ihlandla lobuholi bomasipala kuleli, liphela ngoNovemba 3, 2026. Kulindeleke ukuthi ukhetho lubizwe phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari wangonyaka ozayo. Ngokwezinhlelo ezikhona zokhetho, amalungiselelo okhetho ayaqhubeka phezu kokuba usuku lungakamenyezelwa. UNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezindaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uMengameli we-IFP, nguyena onamandla okumemezela usuku lokhetho. UJoel uthe okunye abakulungiselelayo wukuxoxa nawo wonke amakhansela ukuwalungiselela ukuthi abhekane nesimo uma engabuyeli ezikhundleni. "Inqwaba yamakhansela angeke abuyele ezikhundleni zawo ngemuva kokhetho. Siyawalungiselela, kahle kahle sixoxa nawo wonke ukuze azilungiselele ukuthi kungenzeka angabuyi ngemuva kokhetho. Amanye awo kawazoba neholo ngoba azobe engasatohozi ngakho kumele akulungele lokhu," usho kanje. Uthe kunabanye abasebenzi komasipala, izinkontileka zabo ezincike ezikhulwini zemikhandlu, abangeke babuye ngemuva kokhetho. "Yizona zonke izinto okumele zihlelelwe kusenesikhathi. Kunemibiko okumele yenziwe ngezinhlelo ezenziwe abaholi abakhona komasipala, ezodluliselwa ebuholini obuzongena ngemuva kokhetho," kusho uJoel. Uthe umhlangano wokuqala womasipala kumele uhlale ezinsukwini ezingu-14, ngemuva kokumenyezelwa kwemiphumela yokhetho. Ayisalanga indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali emawadini abo, bayovota kwamanye amawadi uma kunokhetho lokuchibiyela. Ihlale iyindaba egudwini emaqenjini ezombusazwe indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali kuleyo ndawo, bayovota kwenye indawo uma kunalolu khetho. Isikhulu sekhomishini yezokhetho esifundazweni, uDkt Khulekani Zulu, sithe ngaphambi kokhetho badedela uhlu lwabavoti kuleyo ndawo ukuze amaqembu akwazi ukukhalaza uma kukhona angakuboni kahle. "Amaqembu analo ilungelo lokufaka isikhalazo ukuze sisibheke siyikhomishini uma kukhona abantu abangahlali kuleyo wadi. Kumele alethe nobufakazi balokhu ukuze sikwazi ukuphenya," kusho uZulu. Kuvele ukuthi ngo-Agasti, amaqembu kumele aqale uhlelo lokuqoka azofolosa ngabo okhethweni.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzogqunywa esitokisini uFannie Nkosi kuze kuqinisekiswe imininingwane yesicelo sakhe sebheyili Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers USergeant Fannie Nkosi uzogqunywa esitokisini kuze kube uMsombuluko, Ephreli 13, kulandela ukuvela kwakhe eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePretoria North ngoLwesibili. UNkosi uboshwe ngoLwesine, ngemuva kokuba amaphoyisa egasele emzini wakhe osePretoria North. Wachitha impelasonto ende etokile. Inkantolo igunyaze isicelo soMbuso sokuhlehlisa ukuze uqinisekise imininingwane ehlobene nesicelo sakhe sebheyili. UNkosi, oyisikhulu esingaphansi kophiko lobugebengu obuhleliwe eGauteng, ungomunye wabantu abethule ubufakazi phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe uthe ukugasela kwabo kuyingxenye yophenyo oluqhubekayo. Iziphathimandla ziphume umkhankaso wokuthungatha nokushaqa ubufakazi emzini kaNkosi, lapho kubikwa ukuthi zishaqe inqwaba yezinto ezingekho emthethweni, okubalwa izibhamu, izinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ibhomu kanye namadokodo asuka eziteshini ezahlukene zamaphoyisa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IPHOYISA eliwuSayitsheni elisamisiwe uSergeant Fannie Nkosi Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers LISAZOKUBA ukudla kwejele iphoyisa elisolwa ngokuba ubhululu wemigulukudu, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, njengoba kuchithwe isicelo salo sebheyili. INkantolo yeMantshi i-Pretoria North ichithe isicelo sebheyili sikaNkosi izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe amacala okwephula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu, ukutholakala nesiqhumane nezinhlamvu nelokutholakala namadokodo amacala asavalwa. Imantshi uThandi Theledi ithe uNkosi uhlulekile ukuveza izizathu zokuthi kungani kufanele adedelwe ngebheyili. UMbuso ubungafuni ukuthi uNkosi anikwe ibheyili usabela ukuthi angase abalekele icala, njengoba ububeke nokuthi ubona uNkosi ephephile uma esejele ukunokuba anikwe ibheyili ngenxa yokuthi uzwana nemigulukudu engase ifune ukumenzakalisa uma enikwa ibheyili. Ubusabela nokuthi ubengazama ukuphazamisa uphenyo ngenxa yokuthi uyiphoyisa. UNkosi uzogcinwa ejele njengoba amaphoyisa eqhubeka nophenyo lwawo. Usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi ababhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala noKatiso "KT" Molefe. Ngesikhathi efakaza phambi kweKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga, kwavela ukuthi uNkosi kukhona imali ayeyithola kulabo somabhizinisi abasobishini. Kuphinde kuvele ukuthi wayesondelene nosomatekisi owayesatshiswa okwenyoka, uMnuz Jotham "Mswazi" Msibi nePhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa elimisiwe, uLieutenant General Shadrack Sibiya. UNkosi waboshwa emva kokugasela kwamaphoyisa emzini wakhe kulandela ukuvela kwakhe phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. UNkosi usamisiwe emsebenzini njengoba ebhekene nenqwaba yezinsolo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Abalimi bakamoba nabasebenzi abebefuna izincazelo izolo ngekusasa labo kanjalo nelemisebenzi yabanye babasebenzi njengoba bethi kunzima ukusebenza muva nje nemiholo yabo seyehlile ngenxa yokungathengwa komoba wabo ABALIMI bakamoba sebephumele obala bathi bafuna ukwazi ngekusasa labo enkampanini kashukela, iTongaat Hullets. Lokhu bakusho izolo njengoba bebenesiteleka ngaphandle kwamasango ale nkampani, nabanye babasebenzi abaqashwe abasebenza ezimobeni. Bathe manje sesifikile isikhathi sokuthi batshelwe ngekusasa labo njengoba konke kumile, kungekho inqubekela phambili ngokuthengwa kwemikhiqizo yabo, okwenza bangakhiphi isivuno sikamoba, futhi kungangeni mali nabasebenzi bangaholi. Omunye wabatshali bakamoba uMnuz Derrick Mkhize, othe uqashe abantu abangu-70 enkampanini yakhe, uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi selokhu kwavela izindaba zokuthi inkampani kashukela kungenzeka ivalwe, abasebenzi bakhe sekuyizinyanga ezimbili bengatholi amaholo aphelele njengoba ingekho imali engenayo. “Lesi simo asithinti thina kuphela singabalimi bakamoba, kodwa miningi imindeni ethintekayo ngaso njengoba ithembele kithina kodwa nathi lokhu okwenzekayo sekungaphezu kwamandla ethu. Abasebenzi asazi ngempela ukuthi yini esizobatshela yona ngalesi simo ngoba nathi akukho okubambekayo esikuzwayo. South Africa. Member of Parliament Letsike Mmapaseka Steve Emily Credit:PARLIAME IPHINI likaNgqongqoshe wabeSifazane nabantu abaPhila nokuKhubazeka uMmapaseka Steve Letsike, osephumele obala wathi kumele bakulwele ukuthi ingavalwa inkampani kashukela, iTongaat Hullets njengoba iqashe abesifazane netsha eningi Uthe “Uma inkampani ivala, konke esikusebenzele kanzima kuzofa kuphele nya, ngoba iTongaat Hullets iyithemba lethu. Siyacela ukuthi kube bahlangane nathi ukuze kuxoxwe ngento eya phambili, kuvikelele nokuthi isimo somnotho singabi sibi kakhulu kunalokhu esiyikho manje." Amalungu omphakathi abekhona kule mashi anxuse uhulumeni, abaholi emphakathini nasezinkampanini ezehlukene ezithintekauyo ukuthi bangenelele ukuze kuvikeleke imisebenzi yabo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe waBesifazane nabantu abaPhila nokuKhubazeka uMmapaseka Steve Letsike, uphawulile ngalolu daba emsakazweni Igagasi FM, lapho eveze  khona ukuthi uhulumeni lumkhathaze kakhulu lolu daba njengoba inkampani yakwaHullets inkulu. Uthe osomabhizinisi ikakhulukazi abancane yibona abebehlomula kakhulu kule nkampani, wathi kumele bakulwele ukuthi ingavalwa, iqhubeke nokuvula amathuba omsebenzi. "Asikwazi ukuthi kube khona imisebenzi ephelayo kuleli, kukhona abantu besifazane abaningi abasebenza kule nkampani kanjalo nentsha. UMnyango obhekelele imisebenzi uphezu kwalo lolu daba, yingakho nathi siyilo Mnyango singeke sithule." Inkampani kashukela ayiphawulanga.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMOSHE Ndiki izolo oqale ukwethula uhlelo oluthi, Suxoka kuMzansi Magic UBONGA uNkulunkulu ngokuqhubeka emvulela amathuba emkhakheni wokwethula izinhlelo uMoshe Ndiki, emuva kokuba isiteshi iMzansi Magic, simemezele ukubuya kohlelo oluthi Suxoka, ngo-7 ebusuku. Lolu hlelo isizini yalo yesine eze nezinguquko, ibiyethulwa uMotlatsi Mafatshe kuphela kodwa kule sizini kuzoba nabethuli ababili. UMoshe kumanje ungumethuli wohlelo olusha oluthi Mgidi Moms, olungena ngeSonto ngo-6 ntambama, nalo lusanda kuqala kulesi siteshi. Le nsizwa yase-Eastern Cape, iveze ukuthi iyakholelwa ekutheni abantu kumele bangamdeli uNkulunkulu njengoba nayo ikholelwa ekutheni konke okuhle okwenzeka empilweni yayo, kungexa Yakhe. "Angazi nokuthi ngithini ngokuthola ithuba elifana naleli futhi ngisanda kubonakala kolunye uhlelo. Kusho lukhulu kimi ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo njengoba sizophenya amahlazo abantu abawenzayo becabanga ukuthi akukho okuzohlala obala ngelinye ilanga. Ngakho olunye uhlelo lolu oluzosiza abantu bakuleli ezinkingeni abafuna ukuxazululelwa zona, engicabanga ukuthi abantu bazoluthakasela kakhulu," kusho uMoshe. Uthe okunye akubhekile wukusebenza kahle noMotlatsi, asemaze iminyaka eminingi kule ndima abakuyo, nabazobambisana ukuletha lokhu ababukeli abakulindele kubona. UMoshe echaza ngokuba sohlelweni olugqamisa isiko lakwaXhosa lokusoka, uveze ukuthi ukuba nalolu hlelo, kugcizelela ukuthi izinhlelo ezigxile emasikweni kumele zisukunyelwe zenziwe, ukuze amasiko angafi. "Luvele lwangikhumbuza kwamina ohambweni lwami ngesikhathi ngenzelwa leli siko, ngakho ukulwethula kimi kusho lukhulu ngoba yisiko lethu okungamele sililahle, ukuveza isintu ngale ndlela iyonanto okumele siyikhuthalele. Ngizizwa ngithobeka nami ngiwuyise wabafana ababili ngelinye ilanga okumele ngibenzele lolu siko ngakho wuhlelo lolu olusenhliziyweni yami kakhulu," kuchaza yena.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema Image: Abongile Ginya KUHLWE emini kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ngesikhathi egwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele. UMalema ulahlwe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Isinqumo sikhishwe iNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London. IMantshi Twanet Oliver iphinde yagweba uMalema iminyaka emibili ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuphula imithetho elawula ukuphathwa kwezibhamu. Lezigwebo uzozidonsa ngesikhathi esisodwa. UMalema uphinde wahlawuliswa o-R20 000 noma isigwebo sezinyanga eziyisithupha ebhadla ejele kwamanye amacala amathathu amlahlile. Inkantolo inqume ukuthi uMalema aphucwe igunya lokuphatha isibhamu. UMalema ufake isicelo sokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. UMalema waqhumisa isibhamu ngesikhathi kunomcimbi wokubungaza iminyaka eyishumi kwasungulwa i-EFF.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa esebenzisa kwisivimbamgwaqo kuN12 eWestoria, eWest Rand Ibamba likaKhomishana wesiFundazwe saseGauteng, uMajor General Mbuso Khumalo, ujoyine umkhankaso wemikhakha eyahlukene yokuvimba umgwaqo u-N12 no-R28 eWestonaria, esifundeni saseWest Rand, eGauteng. Lo msebenzi ubuholwa nguKhomishana Wesifunda saseWest Rand, uMajor General Lorraine Challen uhlanganise  umnyango wezaseKhaya, amaphoyisa imigwaqo eGauteng, abezinkampqni zezokuphepha kanye nezinhlaka eziqapha emphakathini iCPF. Kuxwayiswa abashayeli ngokujabula bazibheke kuleli Phasika Ngesikhathi kusetshenzwa, kuboshwe abasolwa abayisithupha ngokuba sezweni ngokungemthetho kanti abanye abasolwa abayisithupha baboshelwe ukutholakala nezidakamizwa. Lo msebenzi uyingxenye yemizamo eqhubekayo yokuqinisekisa ukuphepha komphakathi kanye nokuhambisana nomthetho ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika kulo lonke elaseGauteng. UMajor General Mbuso Khumalo usenxuse zonke izakhamuzi nezivakashi ukuthi ziziphathe kahle ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika. Unxuse abasebenzisa umgwaqo ukuthi bahloniphe imithetho yomgwaqo, bagweme ukuphuza nokushayela, babeke eqhulwini ukuphepha ngaso sonke isikhathi. "Sinxusa imiphakathi ukuthi isebenzisane nabezomthetho ngokubika izenzo zobugebengu kanye nokuqinisekisa ukuthi imigubho iqhutshwa ngaphansi komthetho. Sonke asibambe iqhaza ekwenzeni leli Phasika libe yisikhathi esiphephile nesinokuthula kuwo wonke umuntu waseGauteng." UMajor General Mbuso Khumalo usenxuse zonke izakhamuzi nezivakashi ukuthi ziziphathe kahle ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, besesikhungweni i-Forensic Science Laboratory, evulwe ngoLwesihlanu, eMayville Image: Leon Lestrade/Independent Newspapers ZIYIFANISE nokunqoba kwesifundazwe empini yobugebengu obubucayi, eyokuvulwa kweForensic Science Laboratory (FSL), eMayville, eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini, zithe le laboratory enikezelwe nguNgqongqoshe wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dean Mcpherson kwibamba likaNgqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa kuzwelonke, uSolwazi Firoz Cachalia, ibuyisa ithemba empini yokulwa nobugebengu esifundazweni. Phakathi kokunye okuningi okuyamaniswa nophenyo lwamacala, izoba yisikhungo esizohlola amasampula olibofuzo oluqondene namacala okudlwengula enzeka esifundazweni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi phambilini, amasampula alolu hlobo abethunyelwa esikhungweni esenza umsebenzi ofanayo esisePitoli. Lokhu bekuholela ekutheni kube khona izikhalo ngamacala abucayi afana nawokudlwengula njengoba bekuhlale kuvela ukuthi uyaphela nonyaka imiphumela yolibofuzo ingabuyile. Lokhu kuthiwa bekudalwa ukuthi lesi sikhungo senza umsebenzi osuke ulethwe nangezinye izifundazwe. Umsunguli weThekwini Neighbourwood Watch, eqapha ubugebengu emalokishini ehlukene eThekwini, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe ukuvulwa kwesikhungo kuwukunqoba eyobugebengu esifundazweni. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi uphenyo olumaqondana nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo emacaleni okudlwengula, seluzoyeka ukushaya ngonyawo lonwabu, lokhu kusho ukushesha kokutholakala kobulungiswa kubagilwa bokudlwengulwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo,” kusho uJali. Uthe indaba yokwethembela esikhungweni ebesisePitoli, bekubalahlekisela ngethemba abagilwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo. “Umuntu ubefike adlwengule, aboshwe, bathi bayabona abagilwa nemindeni yabo, usededelwe, usezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, kube sengathi ezobulungiswa zibenzela phansi." Uthe uma kwenzeka okufuze lokhu imiphakathi igcina isola amaphoyisa ngokuthi ehlulekile ukwenza umsebenzi wawo ekubeni kungekho asuke angakwenza ukuphuthumisa uhlelo lokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Uqhube wathi abakubhekile manje ukushesha kokuphothulwa kwamacala okudlwengula enkantolo njengoba kungasekho okuzoba yisithiyo ophenyweni oluqondene nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Isolezwe likhumbule iziwombe ezimbalwa ezike zenzeka lihambele amanye amacala ezinkantolo ezehlukene eThekwini. Kwesinye isiwombe esenzeka eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, eminyakeni embalwa edlule, kwangena icala lokudlwengulwa kowesifazane lapho imantshi eyayilisingethe yakhombisa okukhulu ukunengeka ngokuhamba kwesikhathi eside ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. “Leli cala ngiyalihoxisa okwesikhashana. Sekuphele inqwaba yezinyanga ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. Ukuthi uhulumeni waseNingizimu Afrika uyahluleka ukulungisa inkinga yokubambezeleka kwemiphumela yolibofuzo e-laboratory, akuyona inkinga yami leyo noma ekamsolwa,” kwasho imantshi. Yaqhuba yathi ukumgcina ngaphakathi esitokisini umsolwa ngesikhathi kusalindwe imiphumela yolibofuzo okungaziwa ukuthi iyobuya nini, kuwukucindezela amalungelo akhe. Ngaleso sizathu, yamdedela, yathi necala iyalihoxisa, lobuye livulwe uma  sekubuye imiphumela yolibofuzo. Kwenzeka esifanayo eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma, nyakenye, lapho okwakuboshwe khona uthisha wasesikoleni iMtapo High, eLindelani, ngecala lokudlwengula umfundi, wamkhulelisa. Imantshi yavele yamdedela ngaphandle kokuthandabuza, ithi vele kusazothatha eside isikhathi ukuthi icala liqulwe njengoba kwakusazolindwa imiphumela yolibofuzo, okungaziwa ukuthi izobuya nini ePitoli.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UDANYA Devs ngomunye wabaculi asebemenyezelwe abazonandisa emcimbini walo nyaka woGu Jazz Festival KULINDELEKE ukuthi kube noxhaxha lwemicimbi oluzobe yandulela umcimbi omkhulu woGu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27, kulo nyaka. Le ndumezulu yomcimbi izoba sezinkundleni zemidlalo Ugu Sports & Leisure Centre, ePort Shepstone. Lo mcimbi obuye ngonyaka odlule ngezinhlelo ezimbalwa, kulo nyaka abahleli bawo bathembisa ukubuya ngegiya eliphezulu kunelejwayelekile ngemuva kweminyaka ungekho. USiya Msomi wenkampani weCoolsounds Trading, okunguye ohlela lo mcimbi ngokubambisana noMasipala Ugu, uveze ukuthi akade sebewuqalile owaziwa ngokuthi i-Offramp Experience, uzoqhubeka ukwenza imicimbi eyandulela Ugu, okukhona kuwo imikhuleko, ukuqwala izintaba, ukubona izindawo zokuvakasha, umcimbi wamahlala neminye. "Umcimbi I-Offramp Experience uzoqala ngedili lo mcimbi oyi-gala dinner enkundleni efanayo ngoJuni 25, bese kulandela eminye. Emcimbini la kuzobe kukhulekwa i-Worship Experience, wona uzoba ngoJuni 26. Kuwona kukhona nabaculi abahlukene esizobamemezela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Silindele abantu abangu-3 000 bese kuthi emcimbini we-jazz khona silindele abantu abangu-8 000. Ngayo yonke imicimbi sifisa ukuthi abantu bahlangane ndawonye bajabulele umculo nakho konke esizobe sikuhlelile. Sithi abantu abaphume ngobuningi babo bezojabula nathi. Kanjalo nabaculi be-jazz angeke sibaveze bonke namhlanje. Sihlele ukuthi sibamemezele ngokuhamba kwesikhathi," kuchaza yena. IMeya kaMasipala Ugu, uMnuz Sikhumbuzo Mqadi, ithe ngemicimbi enjengalena baningi abantu abahlomulayo nabathola amathuba omsebenzi, hhayi nje abaculi nabanikazi bamahhotela nezindawo zobumnandi. "Uyabona njengoba umcimbi usumenyezelwe nje, sesizoya emphakathini siyobatshela ngamathuba emisebenzi ezoba khona bese siyanxusa ukuthi abantu bathathe amathuba avelayo. Ngeke kugcine lapho, besinenkinga yamanzi kakhulu ngapha kithi, esingakusho nje ukuthi izinkinga ezifana nalezo seziyalungiseka ngakho azikho izinkinga izivakashi zethu ezizobhekana nazo," kusho yena. Emcimbini we-jazz kuboshelwe abaculi okukhona kubo uNaledi Aphiwe, Mawelele, Siphokazi, Mondli Ngcobo, ilungu leqembu iBlaq Diamond uDanya, inkakha emculweni we-jazz uDon Laka, Ernie Smith, Bongani Nkwanyaka, Mnqobi Yazo, Olefied Khetha. KoDJ kulindeleke uDJ 101 noDJ Muntu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUMINZE isangoma ebesiyogeza abantu emfuleni waseNanda, enyakatho yeTheku KUMINZE isangoma, okuthiwa besiyohlambulula abantu edamini laseNanda, endaweni yaseSikebheni, eMzinyathi, ngoMsombuluko. Ngokusho komthombo, umufi ongowesifazane, ubehamba nabanye abantu abambalwa beyogezwa. “Uminze engakabagezi. Bekusewuye kuphela obesangene emanzini,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi isigameko senzeke kusakhanya, nokho umufi abakwazanga ukumhlenga ebebekhona. “Asazi ukuthi bebesukaphi, kodwa akubona abendawo,” kusho umthombo. Ikhansela lendawo, uMnuz Falakhe Gcabashe, lithintwa yiSolezwe, lithe lisanda kuzwa ngodaba, lathi alikakabi nolwazi olugcwele. “Engikutholile wukuthi umufi nalabo abehamba nabo ababona abantu bendawo. Asikabi nalo ulwazi lokuthi bebesuka kuphi nendawo. Okusho ukuthi bebezokwenza lokho ebebezokwenza bese behamba,” kusho uGcabashe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNanda avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe kulandela ukuminza komuntu edamini laseNanda ngoMsombuluko. “Kusolwa ukuthi owesifazane ubegeza abantu edamini eliseSikebheni ngesikhathi eminza,” kusho uSgt Ngcobo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umphathiswa wezeMfundo eKZN uSipho Hlomuka SITHOLE ukwesekwa isiphakamiso sikaNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, sokuthi kuphenywe impilo ephilwa yizikhulu nezisebenzi zoMnyango. UNksz Gwarube umeme uphiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-Special Investigating Unit (SIU), ukuthi lwenze lolu phenyo eMnyangweni wakhe. Ukusho lokhu emva kokuba esolwe ngokuthi ufake unyawo lwedada wangenelela ohlelweni lokuqashwa kozokhulumela lo Mnyango kuzwelonke, kulandela ukuhamba kowayewukhulumela, uMnuz Elijah Mhlanga. Kuthiwa uNksz Gwarube kunomuntu ayemfuna angene esikhundleni, okuyinto ayichithayo. USihlalo wekomiti loMnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha ePhalamende, uMnuz Mr Jan de Villiers, uthe uyaweseka umbono kaNksz Gwarube, wokuthi kuphenywe impilo yezisebenzi boMnyango. Uthe kumele kuhlakazwe isidleke senkohlakalo eMnyangweni, wathi kumele iSIU ilwenze lolu phenyo. "Sifuna uphenyo lugxile kwizisebenzi ezisezinhlakeni ezibalulekile. Yilapho okudlange khona inkohlakalo." Uthe bafuna kuphenywe nangokuqashwa kwezisebenzi eMnyangweni ngokufakwa kobhululu. "Izinsiza zikahulumeni kumele ziye kubafundi, nakulabo abazidingayo, hhayi emaphaketheni abathile. Abafundi yibona abathwala kanzima uma bengazitholi izimfanelo zabo." Uthe bazimisele ukusebenzisana neSIU ekuphenyeni impilo ephilwa abasebenzi eMnyangweni. "Sifuna uma sebebanjiwe abenza inkohlakalo, bavezwe obala. Sifuna bathathelwe nezinyathelo zokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. Sifuna baboshwe futhi labo abenza le nkohlakalo." Uthe bayayeseka yonke imizamo yokuqinisa ukusebenza kukahulumeni ngokulwa nenkohlakalo ukuze kuzuze abantu bakuleli. Inyunyana yothisha, iSadtu, ixwayise uNksz Gwarube ukuthi angasabisi izisebenzi ngokuthi ufuna iSIU iphenye impilo eziyiphilayo ekubeni zisebenza, zihola. Ixwayise ngokuthi ayeke ukufaka unyawo lwedada ohlelweni lokuqashwa kwezisebenzi nezikhulu eMnyangweni ngoba kunemithetho elandelwayo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Usomabhizinisi ochithwe yinkantolo uMnuz Calvin Mathibeli UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uGeneral Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, usishayele ihlombe isinqumo senkantolo Image: Ayanda Ndamane  Independent Newspapers ISICHITHE nezindleko iNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, izolo, isicelo sikasomabhizini osematheni, uMnuz Calvin Mathibeli, sokudlulisela phambili icala. Ngokusho kokhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uMathibeli ubefake isicelo sokuphikisa isinqumo esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoFebhuwari 26 nonyaka. Ngalelo langa, inkantolo yayimyalele ukuthi asuse zonke izinkulumo zakhe ayeziphanyeke ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ezazidicilela phansi igama likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. “Inkantolo yayimnike amahora angu-24 ukuba enze lokho. Yayithe kufanele azikhiphe nakuma-website kanjalo nabakwezindaba ezi-online,” kusho uNetshiunda. Wabe eseyalelwa nokuthi angaphinde asole uMkhwanazi ngezinsolo ezingamampunge, wase eyalelwa ukuthi akhokhele zonke izindleko zabameli. UNetshiunda uthe izinsolo ezehlisa isithunzi ezenziwe uMathibeli, bezingasingcolisa isithunzi sikaMkhwanazi kanjalo nombutho wamaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal. Uthe uMkhwanazi uyasamukela isinqumo sakamumva senkantolo, wathi siyisifundo esibalulekile kulabo abavele badicilele phansi isithunzi sabantu ngaphandle kobufakazi. “Lokhu kunqoba okwezakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika eziwugcinayo umthetho, ezingayingeni eyobugebengu futhi eziphupha ngezwe elingenabugebengu. Nanoma ubani angasolwa kodwa ukwehlisa umuntu isithunzi akufanele kube yingxenye yempikiswano,” kusho yena. Uthe umthetho owawo wonke umuntu ngoba uyilungelo lawonke wonke, elikuMthethosisekelo okufanele lihlonishwe ngaso sonke isikhathi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kuqwashiswa ngobungozi bokuphazanyiswa okuthile ube ushayela nokungadala izingozi zomgwaqo U-EPHRELI uphawulwa njengenyanga yokuqwashisa abantu ngobungozi bokushayela kukhona okubaphazamisayo, nokuyinto okuthiwa ingenye yezimbangela ezinkulu zezingozi emgwaqweni. Isikhulu senkampani efundisa ukushayela futhi egqugquzela ukuphepha emgwaqweni iMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, sithe imininingwane yezinkampani zemishwalense ikhomba ukuthi ukushayela bese kuba nokukuphazamisayo kwenyusa amathuba okushayisa ngo-60%. “Ngokwe-World Health Organisation, ukusebenzisa iselula ube ushayela kunyusa amathuba okushayisa ngokuphindwe kane. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukuyibamba ngesandla nokusebenzisa iBluetooth. ENingizimu Afrika, iRoad Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) ihlale ibalula ukuphazamiseka komshayeli njengokuphambili ezingozini okufa kuzo abantu. Kunzima ukuthola ulwazi oluqondile ngoba emuva kwengozi akulula ukusho kugcwale umlomo ukuthi ingozi idalwe wumshayeli obephazamisekile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe ucwaningo lososayensi luthi kunzima ukuthi unganaka ngokugcwele izinto ezimbili kanye kanye. Kunalokho umqondo ulokhu ushintsha ngokushesha unaka izinto ozenzayo ngokwahlukana. “Kuleyo mizuzwana unganakile yonke into ingaphuma esandleni. Ngesivinini esingu-120km/h, imoto ihamba ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-33 metres njalo ngomzuzwana. Ukubuka iselula imizuzwana emine kuya kwemihlanu kufana nokuhamba ibanga enkundleni ye-rugby ucimezile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe akuyona iselula kuphela kodwa nakhu okunye:

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPHROJUSA womculo, uXowla, ukhiphe i-albhamu yesitebele sakhe somculo iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1 UPHROJUSA womculo ozakhele igama kubalandeli ngenqwaba yezingoma zamaciko ehlukene ezikhiqizwe eNkabi Records, uXowla obuye aziwe ngelikaStallion, usebenzise i-albhamu entsha ukuhlonipha iqhawe lakhe emculweni Kule albhamu ephume ngaphansi kwesitebele sakhe iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1, uXowla uhloniphe uBhekumuzi Luthuli (ongasekho emhlabeni) engomeni ethi Silwelani, uyishintshe kancane ingoma kamfo kaMolo, ethi Sokukhumbula. Kulena ethi Silwelani, uXowla usebenze noSiya Ntuli, uSminofu, owayeyimbangi enkulu kaBhekumuzi, uThokozani “Somnandi” Langa, wase futhi efaka izinhlamvu zikamfo kaMolo, kanjalo nendodana yakhe uMadlanduna. “Lokhu ngikwenze ngoba kusukela ebuncaneni bami, ngikhule ngibukela kakhulu kuyena (uBhekumuzi) futhi ungelinye lamaciko engiyohlale ngiwahlonipha ngenxa yeqhaza lawo emculweni. Yingakho ngibone kusemqoka ukusebenzisa lo msebenzi ukufaka ingoma yokumhlonipha futhi engingabheke kwenza nzuzo nhlobo ngayo,” kusho uXowla. UPHROJUSA womculo, uXowla, ukhiphe i-albhamu yesitebele sakhe somculo iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1 Udalule nokuthi lo msebenzi uyindlela yakhe yokukhombisa ukuthi usekhule kangakanani emculweni futhi ubheke kakhulu nokukhombisa ububanzi bobuciko bakhe bokudidiyela umculo ngobunyoninco, yingakho esebenzisane namaciko awu-25 kuyona. Emacikweni asebenze nawo kule albhamu enezingoma eziwu-12 kukhona omfo kaMsezane, Uziyam’ Qhuksa, Mashabeni, Shwi Mantombazane, Dr Buselaphi, Bonakele, Quality Biyela, Umfana WeKhansela, Gatsheni, uKhuthuza, Mehlabomvu, Imfezi Emnyama, Kraizie, Mjolisi, Mlabalaba, Dumakahle, Diary, Pretty Masompisi, imbongi uZamo Cofi, Navigator Gcwensa, Siya Ntuli, Siphiwe Black, Qoqa Q7; nabadlali besiginci oMtuyenziwa, Pheny’ Awufake noMehlabomvu. “Lo msebenzi ufana nendlela yokwendlalela okukhulu engibheke ukukwenza nokukufeza ngobuciko bami futhi angibheke zinto ezinkulu nezibabazekayo ngawo. Ngifisa ukuthi ufinyelele kuwona wonke umuntu ozohambisana naye,” kulanda uXowla. Leli ciko elidabuka eMnambithi, maphakathi neKwaZulu-Natal, igama lalo lokuzalwa wuXolani Shabalala. Laziwa kakhulu ngesandla salo sokuphrojusa izingoma eziningi okubalwa kuzona i-albhamu kaLwah Ndlunkulu yokuqala ethi Imizwa, Umbayimbayi weziNkabi Zezwe, ne-albhamu kaBig Zulu ethi Escongweni, ukukha nje phezulu.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE womnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi BEVILE ku-500 ngosuku abantu abangeniswa ezibhedlela ezizimele kuleli abakhokhelwa yiGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi uMzamo Buthelezi, ephendula imibuzo yelungu le-EFF ePhalamende. UButhelezi uthe ngosuku i-GEMS yamukela amalungu amasha angu-112. Uthe ikhokha cishe u-R182 milllion njalo ngosuku kanti ongoti bodokotela bakhokhelwa ngosuku u-R27 milion. "Ngosuku i-GEMS ikhokhela izibhedlela ezizimele ngezingane ezingu-60, ezizalwa ngosuku. Zizalwa abantu abasuke besikiwe, abanye basuke bezibelethele. Bangu-593 abangeniswa ezibhedlela nsuku zonke," kusho uButhelezi. Ubechaza ngezinselelo ezibhekene ne-GEMS enyuse imali ngenxa yokunyuka kwezindleko. Sisuse umsindo isenzo se-GEMS sokunyusa imali ekuqaleni konyaka, okwenze izinyunyana zabasebenzi zamashela ukwehliswa kwemali. Okwamanje kusaqhubeka izingxoxo zokuzama ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni njengoba i-GEMS ikhale ngokunyuka kwezindleko okuyimbangela yokunyuswa kwemali ekhokhwa amalungu. Okunye i-GEMS ekhale ngakho yinkohlakalo edla lubi, njengoba amanye amalungu elalisa izihlobo zawo ezingeyona ingxenye ye-GEMS, bese kudingeka lesi sikhwama sikhokhe. Izinyunyana zikhale ngokuthi i-GEMS ibuye ingafuni ukukhokha. UButhelezi empendulweni, uthe i-GEMS iyakhokha uma kungukuthi kuyahambisana nemigomo ebekiwe ethinta ezempilo. "Uma kwenzeka i-GEMS inqaba ukukhokha, kusuke kufaka izinto ezehlukene okubalwa ukusebenzisa izibhedlela ezingeyona ingxenye yezikhungo ezikhokhelwa yilesi sikhwama. Kokunye kusuke kungazange kutholakale imvume ngaphambi kokuba ogulayo angeniswe esibhedlela." Uthe kokunye kusuke kunemininingwane engaphelele noma ezinye izinto okumele zikhokhelwe ezisuke zingekho ngaphansi ezikhavwe yilesi sikhwama. Uveze nokuthi nyakenye, i-GEMS ikhokhele izindleko ezibalelwa ku-R67 billion, ekubeni amalungu akhokha u-R65 billion. Ubalule nokuthi abalesi sikhwama basebenzisa u-R10 billion, ukukhava izindleko ukuze imali ezokhokhwa amalungu inganyuswa kakhulu. UButhelezi uthe ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo phakathi kwezinyunyana ezingaphansi komfelandawonye iCosatu neFedusa, ngokunyuswa kwemali.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ekhuluma nabezindaba ekomkhulu laleli qembu eWinnie Madikizela-Mandela House. Image: Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspapers UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ufuna iqembu lakhe linikezwe isikhundla soMphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal. UMalema uthe noma kanjani bazosithola isikhundla asifunayo uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo. I-EFF yeseka imizamo yeMKP yokuchitha uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe isifundazwe. Isiphakamiso seMKP sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, sachithwa ngonyaka odlule. UMalema uthe bazogcina bewuchithile uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, wathi nabo bazoba yingxenye yokuphathwa kwesifundazwe uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni oholwa yi-IFP. "Sizoba nabaphathiswa KwaZulu-Natal kuhulumeni weMKP. Ungajahi, ijubane liyabulala. Siyasebenza lapha KwaZulu-Natal futhi kukhona okuzokwenzeka maduze. Uyazi ukuthi ngamahora amabili kuningi okungashintsha kwipolitiki." UMalema uthe bafuna ukuthi i-ANC ibambisane nabo neMKP. "Ilawa maqembu azophatha izwe ngomuso." UMalema uphinde wachaza kabanzi ngobudlelwano bakhe nabantu okuvela amagama abo kwikhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. UMalema uvumile ukuthi uyazana nosomabhizinisi uMnuz Ze Nxumalo nosomatekisi osashona owayesatshiswa okwenyoka, uMnuz Jotham "Mswazi" Msibi. Uvumile impela ukuthi wethula inkulumo emngcwabeni kaMsibi. Uthe waqala ukwazana noMsibi ngesikhathi kunesiteleka samatekisi. Uqhube wathi babexoxa ngezinto ezithinta amatekisi noMsibi. "Ngangiya kuyena ngiyomcela ukuthi behlise imali yokugibela ematekisini. Baningi abantu be-EFF abagibela amatekisi. Ayikho into ewubugebengu esasiyixoxa naye." UMalema uthe akukho okubi ngobudlelwano bakhe noNxumalo. "UZe ngazi ukuthi uyingane kaSolwazi Otty Nxumalo, owayengunobhala jikelele wokuqala we-IFP." UMalema uthe uNxumalo ungumngani wosomabhizinisi abaningi okubalwa kubo nabamhlophe. "UZe uwumngani wosomabhizinisi abaningi. Uyazi ukuthi uke avakashele ngisho emapulazini kaMnuz Johan Rupert? UZe ungumngani wendodakazi kaRupert. Kungani ningababuzi bona labo somabhizinisi ukuthi yini ebahlanganisa noNxumalo? Nibasabani abelungu?" UMalema uthe akukho okutheni ngobudlelwano bakhe nePhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa elimisiwe, uLiuetenant General Shadrack Sibiya. "Ngimazi ngokomsebenzi." Uthe akazibandakanyi nezenzo zobugebengu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: SEKUBIZA imali ethe maxa ukwetha izimoto eNingizimu Afrika kusuka kuqale inyanga Image:  Tumi Pakkies / Independent Newspapers ABASHAYELI bavuke ngoLwesithathu isinyukile intengo kaphethroli nekadizili eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yokunyuka kwekawoyela okudalwe yimpi eqhubeka e-Iran. Ekaphethroli u-93 unleaded no-95 unleaded inyuke ngoR3.06 ilitha. Ekadizili u-500ppm inyuke ngo-R7.37 kwathi eka-50ppm yona yanyuka ngo-R7.51 ilitha. Uhulumeni umemezele ukuthi uphungulele abashayeli umthwalo ngokukwehlisa intela ye-general fuel levy ngoR3 isikhashana kuze kube yinyanga ezayo lapho uzophinde ubuyekeze khona leso sinqumo. Yize kunjalo kodwa intengo yelitha likadizili ibiza imali engaphansi kancane kukaR30. Isikhulu seMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, phambilini sake sakhipha amathiphu angasiza abashayeli ukuthi bonge. Nazi izinto okumele bazenze: Amathayi: Hlala njalo uhlola ukuthi umoya osemathayini uyahambisana yini noshiwo yinkampani eyakha imoto. Lokhu kungenza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-3 kuya ku-5%. Ukunyathela amafutha mawala: Uma unyathela amafutha kahle ushiye isikhala esanele phakathi kwakho nemoto oyilandelayo kusiza ukuthi ungabhreki kungenasidingo uphinde unyathele nokungakusiza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-15%. RPMs: Ezimotweni ezishintshwayo, ukushintsha amagiya engakafiki ku-3 000rpm kusiza ukuthi wonge kuphethroli. Ijubane: Uma wehlisa isivinini ngo-20km/h kungasiza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-20% Ukushayela budlabha: Lokhu kunciphisa ukonga ngo-15 kuya ku-30% kuthelawayeka no-10 kuya ku-40% esiminyaminyeni lapho uma uphinde usuke khona. Yehlisa umoya uma ushayela. Ukulayisha umthwalo ongenasidingo: Khipha izinto ezingenasidingo emotweni. Ukudumisa imoto ibe imile: Ukudumisa imoto ume imizuzwana engaphezu kwengu-30 kumosha uphethroli. Ama-sensor alawula indlela izimoto zakamuva ezidla ngayo uphethroli, kwenza singabi khona isidingo sokulokhu uyifudumeza.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers UBUYELA enkantolo umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, lapho kuzoqhubeka khona icala lakhe lokuqhumisa isibhamu. UMalema uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London, ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine, lapho kuzokwenziwa izethulo ezandulela isigwebo. Ukulalelwa kwezethulo kwahlehliswa ngoJanuwari. UMalema walahlwa yicala lokuqhumisa isibhamu ngonyaka owedlule. Wavulelwa icala emva kokuba kusabalale i-video emkhombisa eqhumisa isibhamu, emcimbini wokugubha iminyaka kwasungulwa i-EFF. Umcimbi aqhumisa kuwo isibhamu wawuseMdantshane, ngo-2018. UMalema uveze ukuthi uMbuso ufuna ukuthi agwetshwe iminyaka engu-15 ebhadla ejele. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba ngeledlule. Uthe sekumcacele ukuthi kukhona umuntu ofuna ukumbona ebhadla ejele. "Uyabona ukuthi uMbuso uyangicindezela. Bathi bafuna ngigwetshwe iminyaka engu-15. Abameli bami bazophikisana nalesi sigwebo abasifunayo kodwa into ecacile ukuthi bangifuna ejele. Anginankinga nokuthi kube khona abafuna ukungibona ngisejele." UMalema usengcupheni yokulahlekelwa isikhundla sokuba yilungu lePhalamende, uma egcine enikwe isigwebo esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ebhadla ejele. Umthetho awubavumeli asebeke bagwetshwa isikhathi esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ukuba babe amalungu ePhalamende. Ukugwetshwa kukaMalema ukuba abhadle ejele, kungaphazamisa umkhankaso weqembu wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo. Amalungu e-EFF kulindeleke ukuthi abhikishe ngaphandle kwenkantolo ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine. Inkantolo kulindeleke ukuthi imemezele usuku lokukhishwa kwesigwebo uma uMbuso nabameli bakaMalema sebeqede ukwenza izethulo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Zimkhalele usgaxabhande osolwa ngokuthatha ngozwane izigidi zombutho Amaphoyisa ophiko olulwa nenkohlakalo abophe uKapteni oneminyaka engu-53 ubudala ngecala lokukhwabanisa. Ukuboshwa kwakhe kuvela ophenyweni lwangaphakathi olugunyazwe Uphiko lwezokuphathwa kwemali, kulandela ukuthengiselana okusolisayo ohlelweni lwe-POLFIN. Lo kaputeni usebenzela uphiko lwezezimali lwe-Protection and Security Service (PSS) kusolwa ukuthi lasebenzisa isikhundla salo ukuze likhiphe imali efinyelela ezigidini. Uphenyo seluthole ukuthi wasebenzisa Lesi sikhundla ukuze azibekele yena ukheshi ecasha ngokuthi le mali yayihloselwe izindleko zokuhamba zabavikeli abasebenza nabangaphansi kwePresidential Protection Services (PPS). Olunye uphenyo luthole ukuthi imali ayitholwanga ngabavikeli, kodwa wayeyikhipha yena iyisamba semali. Ngemuva kophenyo oluthathe isikhathi eside, kubhaliswe icala lokukhwabanisa esiteshini samaphoyisa eSunnyside kanti uphenyo lwangaphakathi lomnyango seluholele ekutheni amiswe. Lo kaputeni uzovela ngoLwesibili, 07 Ephreli 2026, ngaphambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yasePitoli ngecala lokukhwabanisa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S ilandele ejwayelekile ngokuthuthukiswa yashintshwa indlela ebukeka ngayo ngaphandle nangaphakathi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: TOYOTA COROLLA CROSS GR-S EKUQALENI konyaka odlule kwaToyota South Africa Motors bethule iCorolla Cross ethuthukisiwe kwazise ibisineminyaka ikhona njengoba yaqala ukudayisa ngo-2021. Kusuka yaqala ukudayisa, le moto eyakhiwa efemini yakwa-Toyota eseProspecton, eThekwini, idayisa ubuthaphuthaphu. Empeleni yiyona SUV edayisa kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe angu-22 191. Ngesikhathi ithuthukisiwe nyakenye, iGR-S iqhubeke nokudayisa njengokujwayelekile. Kushintshile lokho kuleli sonto ekomkhulu leToyota Gazoo Racing enkundleni yezimoto zomjaho, iZwartkops Raceway, eGauteng, kwethulwa iCorolla Cross GR-S ethuthukisiwe. Kube yindawo efanele yokusingatha umcimbi kwazise uGR-S umele uGazoo Racing Sport. Le moto yiyona GR-S edayisa kakhulu okuwedlula wonke kwaToyota. Nokho kwiCorolla Cross izinguquko azenzekanga enjinini njengoba kuseqhubeka ebezikhona phambilini. Zehlukene, kukhona ekaphethroli nengunhliziyombili i-hybrid ehlanganise ekaphethroli nekagesi. IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S itholakala ngemibala emithathu ehlukene emzimbeni engafani nokhakhayi olumnyama Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ekaphethroli injini ingu-1.8 litre enamandla angu-103kW ne-torque engu-172Nm. U-gearbox ungumshini ozishintshayo oyi-CVT. Kwabafuna ukonga eyi-hybrid inamandla ahlanganisiwe angu-90kW ne-torque engu-142kW. Ngo-100km bathi idla amalitha angu-4.3 nokuyinto enhle kulesi sikhathi lapho simelwe wukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli. Ngiyishayela ePitoli kuleli sonto isuka buthule ize iqale ukuduma uma usunyusa isivinini. Lapho iCorolla Cross eshintshwe khona yindlela ebukeka ngayo, ezinye izinguquko esezivele zikhona kwejwayelekile. Ishintshe amalambu angama-LED ngaphambili kwafakwa nama-indicator akhanya sakudweba. I-grille emnyama nayo ishintshiwe, kanjalo ne-skid plate ezansi. Ezinhlangothini kushintshwe amarimu angu-18 inch nesiketi ngezansi. Ukhakhayi lusemnyama njengaphambilini, alufani nombala womzimba. Imibala okhetha kuyo ngomhlophe, osiliva nobomvu. Ngaphakathi umbala obomvu ufakwe emabhandeni nokuyenza ibukeke i-sporty. Amesha nezitishi ezibomvu ezisesiteringini sesikhumba esimnyama esinophawu lakwa-GR. Okunye okuyenza ibe "sporty" ama-pedal ezansi. IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S ifakwe ama-pedals acwebezelayo ukuyenza ibukeke i-sporty Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Baphinde bashintsha i-centre console ngasegiyeni nokuyinto eyenziwe nakumaCorolla Cross ajwayelekile. Kuningi okunye efika nakho njenge-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10.1 inch lapho uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto futhi iveze nengaphandle ngamakhamera. Ine-digital instrument cluster engu-12.4 inch, unyakazisa unyawo ngaphansi kwebhuthi ukuze ivuleke, izihlalo zesikhumba nokunye. Kwezokuphepha inama-airbag ayisikhombisa, iyasho uma uphuma emzileni nokunye. Mihla namalanga kwethulwa ama-SUV amasha eNingizimu Afrika ngakho bekumele kwaToyota bayithuthukise ukuze bengasaleli ngemuva. Uma uyiqhathanisa neHaval Jolion, Omoda C5, Jetour Dashing, Chery Tiggo 7 Pro iziqengqelezela yodwa phambili ngokudayisa. Yinto efanayo nnakwiCorolla Cross GR-S ebambe u-50% wemakethe uma uyiqhathanisa neVW T-Cross R-Line neHaval Jolion S. Toyota Corolla Cross 1.8 GR-S – R527 000 Toyota Corolla Cross 1.8 HEV GR-S – R569 700 Zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisithupha noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km. Eyi-hybrid ine-warranty yebhethri yeminyaka eyisishiyagalombili noma u-160 000km.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ezinye zezinto ezitholakale ngesikhathi kuseshwa iziboshwa Ukubonakala weziboshwa zichanasa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okuhlanganisa ukuvela bukhoma ku-TikTok, nakwezinye izinkundla yikona okuziqhathe nezikaDalawane. Ukuqinisa imizamo yokuqeda ukungeniswa kwezinto ezingafanele ezikhungweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwezimilo ezweni lonke, izikhulu zejele ziphume umkhankaso wokusesha iziboshwa zingazelele. UKhomishana kazwelonke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo eqhuba umsebenzi ePollmoor, eKapa UKhomishana kazwelonke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo uMnuz Makgothi Thobakgale uhole uhlelo lokusesha ejele i-Pollsmoor Correctional Centre, eseKapa, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Kuwumkhankaso ohlanganyelwe ohlanganisa i-DCS Emergency Support Team (EST) kanye namalungu ombutho wamaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS), izikhulu zithole izinto ezingekho emthethweni ezihlanganisa omakhalekhukhwini, izidakamizwa, nezikhali ezicijile. Ukutholakala kwalezi zinto kufakazela ukuthi ozikhulu ezikhohlakele ziyaqhubeka nokwenza lula ukushushumbiswa kwalezi zinto ezikhungweni. nke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo uMnuz Makgothi Thobakgale uhole uhlelo lokusesha ejele i-Pollsmoor Correctional Centre, eseKapa, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku.
